Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees, Litigation Expenses And Service Award
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KYLE NORDREHAUG, ESQ. of Law Offices Blumenthal, Nordrehaug & Bhowmik, Tel No. 858-551-1223 appearing for Plaintiff;
Atty. NATALJA M. FULTON, ESQ. of Jackson Lewis P.C., Tel No. 415-796-5446 appearing for Defendant Norco Delivery Service, Inc.

The Court required parties to appear at hearing. Matter discussed by the Court and counsel. The Court orders as follows: As to PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED ABU-ARAFEH'S Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees, Litigation Expenses And Service Award, the Court awards $5,000.00 to Plaintiff Mohammed Abu-Arafeh as a service award. The Court awards attorneys' fees of $150,00.00 ($195,000.00 if the maximum settlement amount is paid) and expenses in the amount of $11,199.10. "ORDER GRANTING FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT" SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Atty. NATALJA M. FULTON, ESQ. of Jackson Lewis P.C., Tel No. 415-796-5446 appearing for Defendant Norco Delivery Service, Inc.

The Court required parties to appear at hearing. Matter discussed by the Court and counsel. The Court orders as follows: PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED ABU-ARAFEG'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Settlement is granted with modifications as to the service award and award of attorneys' fees. The Court awards $5,000.00 to Plaintiff Mohammed Abu-Arafeh as a service award. The Court awards attorneys' fees of $150,00.00 ($195,000.00 if the maximum settlement amount is paid). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. FINAL JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
